reason: Massive financial losses reported by a major crypto firm (BitMine Immersion) raise concerns about solvency and potential cascading effects. Simultaneously, persistent reports of sanctions evasion (Elliptic) could trigger stricter regulatory action and further dampen institutional sentiment. While Crypto.com's regulatory approval offers long-term positive signals, the immediate market outlook is clouded by these significant risks and overall market weakness, suggesting potential for further downward pressure.
headlines: Crypto.com wins initial approval for U.S. federally regulated crypto custodian bank
Anthony Pompliano led Procap Financial dips toe into buybacks
Elliptic flags Russia-linked crypto platforms’ ongoing sanctions evasion
CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE gains 1.7% while index trades lower over weekend
BitMine Immersion added $98 million of ether last week as losses balloon to more than $8 billion
